'''Yarith Figg''' was a lesser noble [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] and the wife of explorer [[Ecclessis Figg/Legends|Ecclessis Figg]]. Yarith met her husband on a [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] running along the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]], where Ecclessis ended up saving her life. The two eventually married, and Yarith poured her Alderaanian fortune into Figg's business venture, the [[Outer Javin Company]]. As a result of the success from Figg's [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] explorations with the new company, the couple became extremely wealthy, eventually founding [[Figg & Associates]], a privately-held cousin company to the Outer Javin Company.

Yarith and her husband Ecclessis had several descendants, who maintained control of the [[Figg conglomerate]] and family wealth many years after the couple's death.
